mapper.update: UPDATE t_user SET following_count = CASE WHEN id = #{followerId} AND following_count >= #{decrementNum} THEN following_count - #{decrementNum} ELSE following_count END, follower_count = CASE WHEN id = #{followeeId} AND follower_count >= #{decrementNum} THEN follower_count - #{decrementNum} ELSE follower_count END WHERE id IN (#{followerId}, #{followeeId}) AND del_flag = 0

UPDATE t_user SET following_count = CASE WHEN id = #{followerId} THEN following_count + #{incrementNum} ELSE following_count END, follower_count = CASE WHEN id = #{followeeId} THEN follower_count + #{incrementNum} ELSE follower_count END WHERE id IN (#{followerId}, #{followeeId}) AND del_flag = 0
